description_long: This object is a cubic barrel or bucket with a stylized, pixelated wood texture reminiscent of those found in video games like Minecraft. The sides display vertical and horizontal bands in various shades of brown, simulating wooden planks and structural reinforcements. The top surface features a slightly lighter patch, possibly representing a lid or access panel, with no visible handles or openings. The overall construction appears solid and robust, suitable for storage or containment. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements on any side. The object is likely intended for use in outdoor or semi-industrial urban environments, such as alleys, storage yards, or construction sites.
description: A cubic, pixelated wooden barrel or bucket with banded sides and a subtle lid-like top, featuring various shades of brown and no visible handles or markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows vertical and horizontal wood grain patterns with a central lighter patch near the top.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with similar wood banding and a slightly offset lighter patch on the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a more pronounced lighter area on the top and consistent wood plank textures.
description_view_3: Back view with uniform wood grain and the lightest top patch shifted further to the right.
